text:
Tracheostomy Care (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving tracheostomy care. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
589 INVSV_VNTLTR_ADMSN_CD INVSV_VNTLTR_ADMSN_CD Therapies: Invasive Mechanical Ventilator (Admis) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving invasive mechanical ventilator (or respirator) therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
590
